expectations.text: profile-hook-created: profile edit 전용 훅이 hooks/utils/profile 경로에 생성된다 (예: hooks/utils/profile/useProfileEdit/index.ts)
hook-use-prefix: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useProfileEdit, which starts with 'use'

expectations.text: hook-index-ts: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File path is hooks/utils/profile/useProfileEdit/index.ts, matching the required pattern

expectations.text: page-no-inline-usestate: page.tsx에 다수의 인라인 useState가 그대로 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains zero useState calls; all state is managed inside useProfileEdit hook

expectations.text: page-section-layout: page에는 섹션 렌더링과 handler 연결만 남는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only destructures values from useProfileEdit and renders view/form sections with handler bindings; no business logic remains

expectations.text: save-error-state: 저장 성공/에러 상태가 훅 반환값에 포함된다
expectations.evidence: Hook returns 'saved' (boolean for success) and 'errors' (Record<string, string> for validation errors)

page.tsx contains data-testid attributes: profile-saved, profile-view, profile-display-name, profile-edit-btn, profile-form, profile-name, profile-bio, profile-birthdate, profile-skills, profile-save, profile-cancel
